payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory was deleted or changed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user and does not contain durable user memory to store.

details: No memory cards were created, modified, or deleted.

repair_options: If you intended to manage your own memories, use a supported non-admin memory management command.
Contact an administrator for privileged operations.
